title: PresenceFootsteps: Remastered Sounds Pack
description: An official resource pack port of Presence Footsteps mod, Brings realistic footsteps sounds into Minecraft!
body:
📖About
- 👣 Presense Footstepsis all about sounds effects, aims to improve the footsteps sounds effect of Minecraft
- 🚨 This sounds pack is an unofficial fork of Sollace's "Presence footsteps" mod, but i convert it into a fully customizable sounds resources pack.
_______________________________________________________________________________________
✅ Features«
+ It's adds realistic Footsteps sounds just like the original mod does.
+ Reverbs sounds effects.
_______________________________________________________________________________________
🤝Relations: « 📝BY FOLLOWING THE MIT LISENCES
- PresenseFootsteps By S0llace
________________________________________________________________________________________

NOTES📌«

- Don't spawning too many mobs around you (ALOT of annoying sounds)
- Best experience with headphones🎧
________________________________________________________________________________________
❓ F.A.Q.«
- Does it works like original mod ?
- This is just a sound-resource pack, i did the best i could.
- How can i customize this sounds pack?
- IF you want to customize the sounds pack, you can access the ''sounds.json'' to config your self, files:sounds->"Presense Footsteps" file that including everything you can refer to customize yourself, i recommended using Audacity for sounds editing.

_______________________________________________________________________________________
👾Bugs&Error Reports«

Contact me on discord: lanixius if you have any question
- I dont hear any sounds❓
- Make sure this pack on the top of your texture packs section, also check your volume for sure.
Version compatible?
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.13 to the lasted version, and will not work in snapshots versions.
- This sounds pack is not working for me
- It may conflict with some sounds mods you better check your files.
- Can i use this pack on my modpack, server ect...?
- Yes you can, considering credit me and the mod's Authors
- Does it work on Fabric Forge, or other Minecraft's cilent?
- This pack compatible with any Minecraft cilent.
________________________________________________________________________________________

⚠ Please READ ⚠«

- This sounds pack currently available on Curseforge, Planet MC, Modrinth✅.
- All the assets under this pack are following MIT lisence and has been authorized by Sollace✅.

_________________________________________________________________________________________
Have Fun 📟!«
